productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so Slipstream Launch and Cacheline High converge at Windglass Relay, banking 134 preserved speed or 175 cargo mastery before generic ascent resumes; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.scope: Next Ledge Cacheline High readable one-launch shortcut
lastRefinementUnit.result: The 175-cargo Cacheline shortcut now frames the live player and target together, applies authored target lead, and clears in one deliberate rightward launch while remaining smaller than Slipstream Launch.

lastCompletedUnit.scope: Next Ledge Cacheline High readable one-launch feel refinement
lastCompletedUnit.result: Cacheline High now clears in one 36-frame rightward launch, scores 175 cargo at Windglass Relay, and returns to the preserved original anchor-11 without inactive branch anchors stealing cable sweep.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All 28 existing Next Ledge test entrypoints, changed JavaScript syntax, JSON, and diff checks passed. Playwright completed the sector-two shortcut through one Cacheline launch, scored 175 cargo at Windglass, caught the original anchor-11 with anchor-12 enabled next, proved a real dead state and keyboard retry, checked closed/open/closed Advanced disclosure, stable settled DOM/entity counts, and a zero-message console. Human View passed the first screen, Cacheline target framing, and scored Windglass state with diagnostics closed and no WebGL overlap. A contemporaneous start-commit checkout measured 21.71 FPS versus 25.40 after, a 17.0 percent improvement; p95 remained 66.8 versus 66.7 ms, long tasks fell from 18 to 6, and no steady-state entity or DOM growth appeared.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Experiments production commit 56d02fa388a4c3c4cd2474e03ccb96fe6ed48dcd is published on origin/main after fetch-before-push verification; ProtoKits is unchanged and synchronized at 04d34f049f58ae359cf71d43466c429dac2a6d08.

exactNextUnit.goal: Add a short branch-neutral rejoin cue and recovery window from Windglass Relay to the original anchor-11 so the scored beat flows into generic ascent without a blind long shot.
